news.headline: $4M in PIXEL tokens to be distributed during Pixels game Guild Wars Season 2: Spore Sports on Ronin network.
news.summary: In the upcoming Guild Wars Season 2: Spore Sports event on the Ronin network, the Ethereum farming game Pixels will be distributing PIXEL tokens valued at $4 million.

news.headline: DC advisors increasingly recommend retirement income solutions to help participants in draw-down years. 30% currently recommend (up from 21% in 2022), while another 40% plan to do so in the future. No clear front-runner product, indicating continued industry innovation required.
news.summary: Retirement plan advisors are increasingly recommending retirement income solutions to help plan participants during draw-down years. Currently, 30% of defined contribution (DC) advisors are actively advocating for these solutions, up from 21% in 2022, and another 40% are likely to do so in the future. The lack of a clear front-runner service or product signals the need for ongoing industry innovation. These insights are from the Retirement Plan Advisor Trends™ report by Escalent, which analyzes the behaviors of financial advisors supporting DC retirement plans. The study highlights the growing demand for retirement income solutions as Baby Boomers retire and Gen Xers face financial challenges. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Metricool integrates Bluesky Social network for decentralized community building, benefitting social media managers and content creators.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, a pioneering social media management tool integrated Bluesky Social, a decentralized microblogging platform, catering to social media managers, content creators, and small business operators. This tool consolidates online community management into a singular platform, streamlining the process. It marks a significant shift in social media strategy, offering a comprehensive solution.

news.headline: Bath & Body Works celebrates Candle Day with NYSE bell ringing, fun run with gold medal athletes, and NYC experience.
news.summary: A popular brand in Columbus, Ohio has launched a unique experience involving various activities to celebrate the cherished event. This experience includes a surround sound of events such as the NYSE bell ringing, a fun run with gold medal athletes, and an immersive NYC experience. The brand aims to provide an engaging and memorable celebration for its loyal members and candle enthusiasts. The initiative is set to take place on December 5, 2024, and is expected to attract a large audience interested in the unique and exciting offerings.

news.headline: MAIN is revolutionizing consumer data with Zero-Party Data amid FTC scrutiny, addressing unethical data practices.
news.summary: Main Assets & Identity Network (MAIN) from New York is revolutionizing the consumer data marketplace with its Zero-Party Data (ZPD) protocol. Launched on December 5, 2024, this innovative solution comes as a response to increased concerns over unethical data practices. MAIN's ZPD aims to address these issues by providing consumers with more control over their data. This move comes at a crucial time as the industry faces mounting pressure to improve transparency and accountability. The initiative is set to reshape the sector, with experts predicting a significant impact on the growing market.

news.headline: Nucleus Research names 9 companies to watch in 2025, expected to excel and innovate in the market.
news.summary: A group of global technology analysts has chosen 9 companies expected to sustain or boost market performance beyond 2025. The selection was unveiled in Miami on December 5, 2024. Nucleus Research revealed the top 9 companies anticipated to progress in 2025. These companies were identified based on various factors considered by Nucleus. The chosen firms are projected to play a significant role in the market's trajectory in the upcoming years.

news.headline: On Track Partners acquires Thomas Garage Door Sales in Central Indiana, expanding its regional presence - Dec 5, 2024.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on December 5, 2024, On Track Partners, a prominent company specializing in residential and commercial garage door services, revealed its acquisition of Thomas Garage Door Sales, a reputable supplier of top-tier garage door solutions in Central Indiana. This acquisition marks a significant move in the industry...

news.headline: Amy Kempinski appointed as President of Pennsylvania Trauma Systems Foundation, to assume role on Jan 1, 2025.
news.summary: In Mechanicsburg, Pennsylvania on December 5, 2024, the Pennsylvania Trauma Systems Foundation (PTSF) Board of Directors revealed the appointment of Amy Kempinski, MSN, RN, CEN, TCRN as the upcoming President. Taking over on January 1, 2025, she will succeed the current President following their retirement.

news.headline: Nashville Chopin announces donors for Piano Rainbow Metro Public School program and names first 5 recipient schools.
news.summary: Today, the directors of Nashville Chopin and Music City Chopin announced the supporters of the Piano Rainbow Metro Nashville Public School program, along with the initial five recipient schools. This news was disclosed in Nashville on December 5, 2024, by Directors Joshua Izzard and their team.

news.headline: Moove partners with Waymo to transform urban mobility. Global leaders in mobility and autonomous driving join forces.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on December 5, 2024, Moove, a prominent player in cutting-edge mobility solutions, revealed a significant fleet partnership with Waymo, the top player in autonomous driving technology. This pioneering collaboration marks the initial commercial partnership between the two companies, showcasing their commitment to advancing innovative mobility solutions.

news.headline: Global anti-drone market projected to reach $23.82 Billion by 2031 with 38.80% CAGR per Verified Market Research®.
news.summary: Verified Market Research®, a prominent business intelligence and market analysis company, is excited to present its latest report on the "Anti Drone Market Size and Forecast." This comprehensive and authoritative analysis offers valuable insights to assist decision-making processes.

news.headline: Electronic Shelf Labels Market valued at $2.34 billion in 2024, projected to reach $4.18 billion by 2029. CAGR of 12.3%.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida on December 5, 2024, it was reported that the market for electronic shelf labels was worth USD 2.34 billion in 2024. Analysts project this market to grow to USD 4.18 billion by 2029, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 12.3% during the forecast period. This data comes from a recent report that does not mention the source.

news.headline: TurningPoint Energy & Madison Energy Infrastructure to construct 20 MW of community solar projects in Illinois.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, TurningPoint Energy and Madison Energy Infrastructure have collaborated to develop 20 megawatts of community solar projects in Will County, Illinois.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price rises 7.77% to $103,439 in 24 hours, 8.0% gain past week, all-time high at $103,679.
news.summary: In the last 24 hours, the price of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has surged by 7.77%, reaching $103,439.00. This marks a continuing uptrend from the past week, with an 8.0% increase from $95,387.70. The current all-time high for Bitcoin stands at $103,679.00. The chart illustrates the price fluctuations and volatility of Bitcoin over the recent period.

news.headline: AI is transforming content creation, with users reporting up to 50% time savings. Emplifi survey reveals the impact of AI in this space.
news.summary: Emplifi, a prominent customer engagement platform based in New York, recently unveiled research showcasing the significant role artificial intelligence (AI) plays in content creation. The study revealed that users are experiencing remarkable time savings of up to 50% with the implementation of AI. This substantial decrease in content creation time is proving to be highly advantageous for creators in diverse sectors, enabling them to allocate more attention to strategic endeavors. The survey indicates that a majority of users who incorporate AI into their content creation processes are benefiting from these time efficiencies.

news.headline: Four Interim HealthCare agencies will implement Netsmart CareFabric platform for integrated care delivery.
news.summary: Netsmart, based in Overland Park, Kansas, has revealed that four Interim HealthCare agencies – located in Colorado Springs, Ft. Collins, Pueblo, and Tucson – have opted for the CareFabric platform for facilitating integrated care provision. They will be incorporating myUnity®, a specialized electronic health record (EHR) tailored for post-acute care environments. This EHR system is designed with features such as enhanced user-friendliness, seamless data exchange, accessibility from anywhere, and augmented intelligence technology.

news.headline: Foresight Diagnostics launches SHORTEN-ctDNA trial at Columbia University to optimize treatment duration for DLBCL patients.
news.summary: Foresight Diagnostics, based in Boulder, Colorado, has introduced the SHORTEN-ctDNA clinical trial at Columbia University. This trial, aiming to assess the effectiveness of Foresight CLARITY™ MRD detection technology, targets real-time treatment optimization for diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) patients. Standard treatment for newly diagnosed DLBCL typically involves six cycles of combination therapy.

news.headline: eClinicalWorks + Sunoh.ai help Healing Hands Ministries in Dallas save time on clinical documentation, focus on patient care. #GameChanger.
news.summary: In Westborough, Massachusetts, eClinicalWorks revealed that Healing Hands Ministries (HHM) in Dallas, Texas, a major Federally Qualified Health Center (FQHC), has effectively integrated Sunoh.ai into their operations. Sunoh.ai, the primary AI medical scribe in the market, allows clinicians to save time on clinical documentation. This enables physicians to concentrate more on patient care. By being EHR-agnostic, Sunoh.ai drastically cuts down the time spent on clinical documentation, enhancing physician productivity.

news.headline: Weave (NYSE: WEAV) wins 2024 Inc. Power Partner Award for supporting healthcare businesses' growth.
news.summary: In Lehi, Utah, Weave, a prominent all-in-one customer experience and payments software platform catering to small and medium-sized healthcare businesses, has been recognized as a 2024 Inc. Power Partner Award recipient. This prestigious accolade celebrates B2B entities that have consistently aided entrepreneurs. Weave secured this honor for its exceptional assistance to customers in fostering business expansion. Notably, Weave, traded publicly under the symbol WEAV on the NYSE, excels in delivering essential support to healthcare providers, who frequently lack specialized backing.

news.headline: Nelnet invests in fintech company Edge Focus, expanding partnership in consumer finance, potential for joint opportunities.
news.summary: In New York, a prominent fintech company called Edge Focus has revealed receiving a strategic investment from Nelnet, Inc. (NYSE: NNI), a financial services entity known for investment management, education technology, and asset servicing. This move deepens the collaboration between the two organizations and involves plans to acquire consumer loan portfolios. The investment signifies an extension of their partnership and signals potential collaborative ventures to capitalize on opportunities within the consumer finance sector.

news.headline: Aktana introduces GenAI Agents, first in the market to survive CRM transitions. #Aktanaactionagent.
news.summary: In San Francisco, an announcement was made by Aktana regarding their groundbreaking GenAI Agents, marking them as the first to do so in the market. These agents have the unique ability to survive Customer Relationship Management (CRM) transitions, ensuring continuity and efficiency in operations. This development introduces an innovative approach that revolutionizes the industry and sets a new standard.

news.headline: Prosegur named most inclusive and equitable private security company globally by Financial Times in 2025.
news.summary: A company based in Deerfield Beach, Florida, Prosegur Security, has achieved the highest ranking in the Financial Times 2025 'Diversity Leaders' list. This recognition is attributed to their commitment to equity, innovation, and maintaining a diverse workforce in the United States.

news.headline: OPEXUS wins 3 NVTC Tech100 awards for gov't process software, 3rd year in a row. CEO Howard Langsam recognized.
news.summary: A prominent government process management software company, OPEXUS, based in Washington, was honored across all three segments in the prestigious 2024 Northern Virginia Technology Council (NVTC) Tech100 awards. This marks the third successive year that OPEXUS has secured a spot as a Tech100 Company, underscoring its position as a prominent tech entity in the region and acknowledging its role in enhancing operational efficiency for government clients. Additionally, the CEO of OPEXUS, Howard Langsam, was recognized for his leadership.

news.headline: Bantec, Inc. (OTCPINK: BANT) secures contracts through subsidiaries Howco and Bantec Environmental Corp. - Chairman CEO Michael Bannon.
news.summary: In Sparta, New Jersey on December 5, 2024, Bantec, Inc. (OTCPINK: BANT), a company specializing in products and services, secured contracts via its subsidiaries Howco Distributing Co. and Bantec Environmental Corp. The company's Chairman and CEO, Michael Bannon, expressed satisfaction with the recent developments, affirming the successful bids made through these subsidiaries.

news.headline: Rigaku introduces XSPA-200 ER detector for X-ray diffraction system, promises high energy resolution to reduce background noise.
news.summary: A global solution partner in X-ray analytical devices, Rigaku Corporation based in Akishima City, Tokyo, recently announced the launch of their latest product, the XSPA-200 ER. This advanced X-ray seamless pixel array detector has started receiving orders and is designed to combat the rise in background noise from samples by utilizing high energy resolution technology. This feature allows for high-sensitivity measurements, making it suitable for samples with varying compositions and properties. Jun Kawakami, the President and CEO of Rigaku, leads the company as a part of the Rigaku Holdings Group.

news.headline: Hard Rock International introduces Unity™ by Hard Rock Mastercard® for loyalty program members, enhancing rewards.
news.summary: Today, Hard Rock International has launched the Unity™ by Hard Rock Mastercard®, offering more opportunities for Unity members to earn rewards at Hard Rock's various hotels, casinos, cafes, and retail outlets. This new initiative aims to enhance the experience for Unity members, providing them with additional benefits and perks. This announcement was made on December 5, 2024, at Hollywood, Florida.

news.headline: Webinar on future packaging trends, AI impact, and sustainability on Dec. 5, 2024 in New York for free registration.
news.summary: Join us for a free webinar on December 5, 2024, in New York to explore the evolving role of packaging in the market. Packaging is no longer just about functionality; it has become a statement reflecting consumer expectations and sustainability goals. Learn how brands can utilize artificial intelligence (AI) to stay ahead in this changing landscape. Register now to secure your spot.

news.headline: Arrayus Technologies treats first patients in Phase I trial with focused ultrasound platform for breast cancer radiation, groundbreaking trial.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 5th, 2024, Arrayus Technologies Inc., a prominent figure in medical innovation globally, disclosed that they have initiated treatment for the initial participants in a novel Phase I clinical trial utilizing their focused ultrasound platform. This pioneering trial integrates the company's exclusive technology...

news.headline: Ribbon cutting for reopening of Blue Mountain Apts in Roxbury, MA - 217 Section 8 units in 19 buildings.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on December 5, 2024, The NHP Foundation (NHPF) marked the grand reopening of Blue Mountain Apartments in New York. The property now boasts 217 multifamily Section 8 units spread out over 19 buildings. The ribbon-cutting ceremony, which took place last month, signified the completion of the revitalization effort on this historic site.

news.headline: Aquarius Engines appoints Gal Friedman as CEO, emphasizing growth and global expansion. Friedman, a founder and ex-chairman, takes charge for the new investment strategy.
news.summary: Gal Friedman, a co-founder and former board chairman and chief marketing officer of the company, has been appointed as the new CEO. This decision underscores a shift towards fostering growth and expanding globally. Friedman's extensive experience in the industry positions the company for strategic development.

news.headline: PerfectQuote joins Optimyl Benefits to provide agencies with instant level-funded RFPs, enhancing group health quoting solutions.
news.summary: AUSTIN, Texas-based PerfectQuote, Inc., a leading provider of group health digital quoting solutions, has revealed a recent collaboration with Optimyl Benefits. This partnership enables subscribers of PerfectQuote to obtain direct, underwritten proposals from Optimyl Benefits for level-funded medical plans. The integration aims to provide enhanced services for users seeking health insurance options. This collaboration signifies a strategic move to expand the offerings available to PerfectQuote's subscribers, enhancing their access to level-funded medical plans through direct underwriting from Optimyl Benefits.

news.headline: Skyservice partners with Starlink to offer new in-flight connectivity solutions. Authorized Starlink Dealer starting Dec 5, 2024.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, in Mississauga, ON, Skyservice Business Aviation revealed they are now an Authorized Starlink Dealer. This partnership expands access to Starlink's high-speed and dependable in-flight services, enhancing their offerings as a top business aviation services provider.

news.headline: Government Scientific Source opens fifth warehouse in Española, NM, expanding into Northern New Mexico.
news.summary: In Española, New Mexico, Government Scientific Source, Inc., a top distributor of laboratory products and equipment, is excited to reveal its expansion into Northern New Mexico by inaugurating its fifth warehouse in Española. This development marks a significant milestone for the company as it aims to enhance its operations in the region. The strategic location of the new warehouse will facilitate efficient distribution of products to customers in the area.

news.headline: Famm launched Famm Connect, a social networking app for LGBTQ+ professionals; offers safe space to network.
news.summary: A new mobile app called Famm Connect has been launched on Dec. 5, 2024 in Sacramento, California. The app aims to create a secure and welcoming environment for LGBTQ+ professionals to connect, work together, and develop professionally. Famm Connect is a part of the Famm platform, which focuses on showcasing LGBTQ+ owned businesses and services. This app is the first of its kind and provides a space for networking and collaboration within the LGBTQ+ community.

news.headline: Fleetworthy acquires Empire Commercial Services, adding NYC commercial parking solutions to fleet technology suite.
news.summary: On December 5, 2024, Fleetworthy announced a strategic expansion in their fleet technology suite by incorporating commercial parking violation management and resolution solutions in New York City. This addition reinforces Fleetworthy's comprehensive offerings for fleet safety, compliance, and efficiency. The move aims to enhance their existing services and better serve their clients.

news.headline: Monique F. Williams appointed Director of Hunter Strategy's Federal PMO, enhancing cybersecurity solutions.
news.summary: In Washington on December 5, 2024, Hunter Strategy, a prominent cybersecurity and technology solutions provider, revealed the selection of Monique F. Williams, PMP, as the new Director of its Federal Project Management Office (PMO). This key addition aims to enhance Hunter Strategy's operations in the federal sector.

news.headline: Fire Brands and Mars Wrigley partner to introduce SNICKERS™, TWIX™ & MILKY WAY™ Chocolate Milks. Favorites reimagined with reduced fat.
news.summary: In Miami, on December 5, 2024, renowned candy brands SNICKERS®, TWIX®, and MILKY WAY® will debut as reduced fat chocolate milks. The new SNICKERS™, TWIX™, and MILKY WAY™ Chocolate Milks offer the flavors of these popular chocolate bars in a liquid form. Fans can now enjoy their favorite candies in a different format, with reduced fat content.

news.headline: Grindr Unveils UNWRAPPED 2024 report featuring insights on queer life trends like sex, dating, travel, pop culture.
news.summary: The annual event Grindr Unwrapped 2024, held in West Hollywood, California, presents key insights into the sex, dating, travel, and pop culture trends that characterized queer life over the past year. This release provides a comprehensive overview of the significant trends affecting the LGBTQ+ community, offering valuable insights and statistics for 2024.

news.headline: Vincent J. Delie, Jr. named CEO of the Year by global business media, adding to FNB's global recognition.
news.summary: Vincent J. Delie, Jr., the Chairman, President, and CEO of F.N.B. Corporation (NYSE: FNB), has been recognized for his outstanding leadership on a global scale. Delie was awarded the prestigious CEO of the Year title by renowned business media. This recognition further solidifies FNB's position in the industry and highlights Delie's exceptional contributions. The announcement was made in Pittsburgh on December 5, 2024. This acknowledgment adds to the growing list of achievements earned by FNB under Delie's guidance, showcasing the company's continued success.

news.headline: CME Group to launch 1-Oz Gold futures contract on Jan 13, 2025 due to rising retail demand.
news.summary: Today in Chicago, the world’s top derivatives marketplace, CME Group, revealed plans to introduce a new futures contract for 1-Ounce Gold (1OZ) starting on January 13, 2025, pending regulatory approval. This move comes as interest in gold as an investment has seen significant growth, especially among retail investors.

news.headline: Segway forms e-bike team with bike vets, focuses on independent dealers for sales ahead of launching new e-bikes.
news.summary: A well-known company specializing in micromobility has revealed the formation of a team comprising experienced individuals from the bike industry. The company is gearing up to introduce its initial line of e-bikes and has disclosed plans to provide assistance to independent dealers. The announcement was made in Arcadia, California, on December 5, 2024.

news.headline: BYUtv premieres "The Primrose Railway Children," starring Kevin McKidd in heartfelt adaptation, in partnership with BBC Studios Kids & Family Productions. Utah, Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: BYUtv, a provider of free, family-friendly entertainment through streaming, cable, and satellite, has teamed up with BBC Studios Kids & Family Productions to create a touching adaptation of a beloved family classic. Set to premiere on December 5, 2024, in Provo, Utah, the show titled "The Primrose" promises to captivate audiences with its heartwarming story. This collaboration signifies a significant milestone for BYUtv, known for producing uplifting content, and showcases its commitment to delivering quality entertainment. The partnership with BBC Studios, a renowned production company, highlights the growing popularity of family-oriented programming. Viewers can look forward to an emotional journey through this enchanting tale, which embodies the essence of wholesome storytelling. Keep an eye out for this highly anticipated release that is sure to resonate with audiences of all ages.

news.headline: Insurtech company Sola raises $3.7M in seed round led by FINTOP Capital, making insurance more affordable and reliable.
news.summary: In Atlanta on December 5, 2024, Sola, an innovative insurtech firm, revealed the completion of its seed funding round. FINTOP Capital spearheaded the investment, joined by Overline, 10vc, Karuna VC, and notable leaders in the insurance sector, resulting in a total funding amount of $3.7 million.

news.headline: ProBio, a CDMO leader, names Allen Guo as CEO & Whitney Winters as SVP of U.S. Business Development.
news.summary: In Hopewell, New Jersey on December 5, 2024, ProBio, a prominent company specializing in contract development and manufacturing (CDMO) services, revealed the selection of key executives. Allen Guo has been named the Chief Executive Officer (CEO), while Whitney Winters will serve as the Senior Vice President of U.S. Business Development. This announcement marks a strategic move for the company during a time of growth and expansion.

news.headline: TruePKU Initiative allows PKU community to share experiences. National PKU Alliance collaborates for PKU treatment.
news.summary: Individuals living with phenylketonuria (PKU) come together to discuss the difficulties involved in managing PKU and their hopes for advancements in PKU treatment. In an event held in Washington on December 5, 2024, the National PKU Alliance (NPKUA) partnered with a group of PKU-focused patient advocacy organizations to address these issues. The gathering highlighted the challenges faced by the estimated X number of people affected by PKU in the United States, shedding light on the need for better treatment options. Participants shared their experiences and aspirations for the future of PKU care, emphasizing the importance of raising awareness and promoting research in the field.

news.headline: SEKO Logistics' 2023-2024 ESG report highlights achievements and progress towards ESG goals.
news.summary: SEKO Logistics, based in Schaumburg, Illinois, recently published its second ESG report, highlighting achievements and advancements made in 2023-2024 in line with their Environmental, Social, and Governance goals.

news.headline: ARBA Retail System launches new ArbaRapidPay, enhancing standalone payroll deductions across diverse POS systems.
news.summary: In LISLE, Illinois, a significant development has occurred as ARBA Retail System has introduced an advanced version of its ArbaRapidPay Standalone Payroll Deductions. This new system aims to improve and simplify Standalone Payroll Deductions across a variety of Point of Sale (POS) platforms, including retail, food services, pharmacy, dermatology, plastic surgery, optometry, audiology, and employee stores operations. The latest technology by ARBA Retail System is strategically crafted to provide efficient payroll deduction services without integration into existing systems. It ensures a seamless experience for businesses in managing payroll deductions with diverse POS systems, enhancing operational efficiency and user experience.

news.headline: Derek Rogers named GM and Director of Sales for KXII and FXII in Sherman, TX, replacing Rick Dean after 39 years.
news.summary: Gray Television, Inc. revealed that Derek Rogers is set to assume the role of General Manager and Director of Sales for KXII (CBS) and FXII (FOX) in Sherman, Texas, starting on January 6, 2025. Rogers will be taking over from Rick Dean, who has been with the stations for 39 years, serving as General Manager for the last 23 years. Dean is retiring from his position, making way for Rogers to lead the stations in the upcoming year. This announcement was made by Gray Media on December 5, 2024.

news.headline: Jared Jewelers and Vera Wang partner for Jared Atelier's limited-edition high jewelry collection; features natural diamonds and rubies.
news.summary: In Akron, Ohio, Jared Jewelers, a luxury brand of Signet Jewelers, unveils its third Jared Atelier limited-edition high jewelry line, in collaboration with renowned fashion figure Vera Wang. This exclusive collection showcases natural diamonds and authentic rubies, emphasizing the essence of high jewelry artistry. Vera Wang's debut collection for Jared Atelier is a blend of classic sophistication and contemporary simplicity, symbolizing an exquisite combination.

news.headline: Wix Studio presents web assets with Pantone Color of the Year 2025 PANTONE 17-1230 Mocha Mousse. Available exclusively on Wix.
news.summary: An exclusive collection of web design assets featuring the 2025 Pantone Color of the Year, PANTONE 17-1230 Mocha Mousse, is now accessible on Wix Studio. This marks the debut of such a capsule of assets aligned with the color theme.
